paragraphs.source: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: On the contrary, we see CPO for scale-up as the killer application. As mentioned earlier, major hyperscalers are already making commitments to suppliers for deployment of CPO-based scale-up solutions by the end of the decade.

pro.text: 相反，我们认为共封装光学（CPO）在纵向扩展中的应用才是关键杀手级应用。正如前文所述，主要的超大规模云服务商已经开始向供应商做出承诺，计划在本十年末部署基于CPO的纵向扩展解决方案。

paragraphs.source: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Currently, the incumbent copper-based scale up paradigm is being pushed to its limits due to the limited reach of copper cables – two meters at best when running at 200Gbit/s per lane, as well as the increasing difficulty of doubling bandwidth per lane. CPO can solve these problems as it can meet bandwidth density requirements, provide multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth well into the future as well as unlock much larger scale up world sizes.

pro.text: 目前，主流的基于铜缆的纵向扩展模式正面临极限：当每通道速率达到200Gbit/s时，铜缆最远只能传输两米，同时每通道带宽翻倍也变得越来越困难。共封装光学（CPO）能够解决这些问题，它可以满足带宽密度要求，并为未来带宽持续扩展提供多种技术路径，同时解锁规模大得多的纵向扩展域。

paragraphs.source: Once CPO is deployed for scale-up networking, the scale-up domain will no longer be limited by the interconnect reach. In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Once CPO is deployed for scale-up networking, the scale-up domain will no longer be limited by the interconnect reach. In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Once CPO is deployed for scale-up networking, the scale-up domain will no longer be limited by the interconnect reach. In principle, customers would be able to grow scale-up domains to arbitrarily large sizes. Of course, if one wants to keep the scale-up domain within a single-tier fan-out network that allows for all-to-all connections, the scale-up domain size would become limited by the switch radix.

pro.text: 一旦CPO部署于纵向扩展网络，纵向扩展域将不再受互连距离限制。原则上，客户能够将纵向扩展域扩展到任意规模。当然，如果希望将纵向扩展域保持在支持全互联的单级扇出网络内，其规模仍会受到交换机基数（switch radix）的限制。

paragraphs.source: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Networking requirements of the scale up fabric are far more demanding than that of the back-end scale-out network. The GPU to GPU or switch links require much higher bandwidth and lower latency to enable the GPUs to be interconnected so that they can coherently share resources such as memory.

pro.text: 纵向扩展网络架构对网络的要求远高于后端横向扩展网络。GPU到GPU或GPU到交换机的链路需要更高的带宽和更低的延迟，才能让GPU实现互连并连贯地共享内存等资源。

paragraphs.source: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: To illustrate, 5th generation NVLink on Nvidia Blackwell offers 900GByte/s (7,200 Gbit/s) of uni-directional bandwidth per GPU. That is 9x more bandwidth per GPU than the 100GByte/s (800Gbit/s) per GPU on the back-end scale out network (using the CX-8 NIC for the GB300 NVL72). This also creates the need for much higher shoreline bandwidth density from the host which has been the impetus for pushing GPU SerDes line speeds forward.

pro.text: 以英伟达布莱克韦尔（Blackwell）上的第五代NVLink为例，每块GPU可提供900 GB/s（7,200 Gbit/s）的单向带宽。这比后端横向扩展网络中每块GPU的100 GB/s（800 Gbit/s）带宽高出9倍（后端使用CX-8 NIC连接GB300 NVL72）。这也对主机侧的边缘带宽密度提出了更高要求，正是推动GPU SerDes线速率不断提升的主要动力。

paragraphs.source: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: It is also important to realize that as the size of scale-up domains increases and as the speed of scale-up interconnect grows as well, the TAM of scale-up interconnect (and eventually, scale-up CPO) has already considerably dwarfed that of scale-out networking. CPO TAM is likely to be dominated by scale-up rather than scale-out networking applications.

pro.text: 还需认识到，随着纵向扩展域规模不断扩大以及纵向扩展互连速度持续提升，纵向扩展互连（最终是纵向扩展共封装光学）的总可寻址市场已经大幅超过横向扩展网络。CPO的总可寻址市场预计将主要由纵向扩展而非横向扩展网络应用主导。

paragraphs.source: Currently, scale up networks run entirely on copper for good reasons. Matching NVLink bandwidth with optical transceivers in the current pluggable paradigm would be prohibitively expensive in terms of cost and power as well as introducing unwanted latency. There also might not be sufficient face-plate space on the compute tray to even fit all of these transceivers. Copper excels at these low-latency, high-throughput connections. However, as mentioned above, copper’s limited reach restricts the “world size”—the number of GPUs that can be connected within a single scale-up domain.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Currently, scale up networks run entirely on copper for good reasons. Matching NVLink bandwidth with optical transceivers in the current pluggable paradigm would be prohibitively expensive in terms of cost and power as well as introducing unwanted latency. There also might not be sufficient face-plate space on the compute tray to even fit all of these transceivers. Copper excels at these low-latency, high-throughput connections. However, as mentioned above, copper’s limited reach restricts the “world size”—the number of GPUs that can be connected within a single scale-up domain.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Currently, scale up networks run entirely on copper for good reasons. Matching NVLink bandwidth with optical transceivers in the current pluggable paradigm would be prohibitively expensive in terms of cost and power as well as introducing unwanted latency. There also might not be sufficient face-plate space on the compute tray to even fit all of these transceivers. Copper excels at these low-latency, high-throughput connections. However, as mentioned above, copper’s limited reach restricts the “world size”—the number of GPUs that can be connected within a single scale-up domain.

pro.text: 目前，纵向扩展网络完全采用铜缆是有充分理由的。在当前可插拔光模块的范式下，要匹配NVLink的带宽，使用光收发器在成本和功耗上都高得令人望而却步，还会引入额外的延迟。此外，计算托盘的面面板可能也没有足够空间来容纳所有这些收发器。铜缆在实现这些低延迟、高吞吐量的连接方面表现出色。不过，如前所述，铜缆的有限传输距离限制了“世界规模”——即能够在单个纵向扩展域内互连的GPU数量。

paragraphs.source: Increasing scale-up world size is a vitally important avenue of compute scaling. Adding more compute, memory capacity, and memory bandwidth in a single scale up domain has become increasingly critical in today’s regime of inference-based model scaling and test time compute.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Increasing scale-up world size is a vitally important avenue of compute scaling. Adding more compute, memory capacity, and memory bandwidth in a single scale up domain has become increasingly critical in today’s regime of inference-based model scaling and test time compute.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Increasing scale-up world size is a vitally important avenue of compute scaling. Adding more compute, memory capacity, and memory bandwidth in a single scale up domain has become increasingly critical in today’s regime of inference-based model scaling and test time compute.

pro.text: 扩大纵向扩展的世界规模是计算扩展中极其重要的一条路径。在当今基于推理的模型扩展和测试时计算的趋势下，在单个纵向扩展域内增加更多计算、内存容量和内存带宽已变得越来越关键。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia’s GB200 system offered an immense performance boost because it brought the world size to 72 interconnected GPUs in an all-to-all topology from just 8 interconnected GPUs. The result was unlocking tremendous throughput gains through implementing more sophisticated collective communication techniques that are not feasible on the scale out network.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Nvidia’s GB200 system offered an immense performance boost because it brought the world size to 72 interconnected GPUs in an all-to-all topology from just 8 interconnected GPUs. The result was unlocking tremendous throughput gains through implementing more sophisticated collective communication techniques that are not feasible on the scale out network.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Nvidia’s GB200 system offered an immense performance boost because it brought the world size to 72 interconnected GPUs in an all-to-all topology from just 8 interconnected GPUs. The result was unlocking tremendous throughput gains through implementing more sophisticated collective communication techniques that are not feasible on the scale out network.

pro.text: 英伟达的GB200系统带来了巨大的性能提升，因为它将世界规模从仅8个互连GPU扩大到72个GPU的全互联拓扑。结果是通过实现更复杂的集体通信技术（这些技术在横向扩展网络上无法实现）解锁了巨大的吞吐量提升。

paragraphs.source: On copper, this could only be done within the footprint of a single rack creating immense demands on power delivery, thermal management and manufacturability. The complexity of this system has the downstream supply chain still struggling to ramp up capacity.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: On copper, this could only be done within the footprint of a single rack creating immense demands on power delivery, thermal management and manufacturability. The complexity of this system has the downstream supply chain still struggling to ramp up capacity.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: On copper, this could only be done within the footprint of a single rack creating immense demands on power delivery, thermal management and manufacturability. The complexity of this system has the downstream supply chain still struggling to ramp up capacity.

pro.text: 在铜缆方案下，这只能在单个机架的物理空间内完成，从而对供电、热管理和可制造性提出了极高要求。这一系统的复杂性导致下游供应链仍在努力提升产能。

paragraphs.source: Nvidia will continue to persist with copper. They also need to push their scale up world size even higher to keep ahead of competitors such as AMD and the hyperscalers who are catching up with their own scale up networks. As such, Nvidia is forced to go to drastic lengths to expand the scale up domain within a single rack. Nvidia’s extreme Kyber rack architecture for Rubin Ultra that was shown at GTC 2025 can scale up to 144 GPU packages (576 GPU dies). This rack is 4x denser than the already dense GB200/300 NVL72 rack. With the GB200 already being so complicated to manufacture and deploy, Kyber takes it to the next level.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Nvidia will continue to persist with copper. They also need to push their scale up world size even higher to keep ahead of competitors such as AMD and the hyperscalers who are catching up with their own scale up networks. As such, Nvidia is forced to go to drastic lengths to expand the scale up domain within a single rack. Nvidia’s extreme Kyber rack architecture for Rubin Ultra that was shown at GTC 2025 can scale up to 144 GPU packages (576 GPU dies). This rack is 4x denser than the already dense GB200/300 NVL72 rack. With the GB200 already being so complicated to manufacture and deploy, Kyber takes it to the next level.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Nvidia will continue to persist with copper. They also need to push their scale up world size even higher to keep ahead of competitors such as AMD and the hyperscalers who are catching up with their own scale up networks. As such, Nvidia is forced to go to drastic lengths to expand the scale up domain within a single rack. Nvidia’s extreme Kyber rack architecture for Rubin Ultra that was shown at GTC 2025 can scale up to 144 GPU packages (576 GPU dies). This rack is 4x denser than the already dense GB200/300 NVL72 rack. With the GB200 already being so complicated to manufacture and deploy, Kyber takes it to the next level.

pro.text: 英伟达将继续坚持使用铜缆。他们还需要进一步提升纵向扩展的规模，以保持对AMD和正在追赶的自研纵向扩展网络的超大规模云厂商等竞争对手的优势。因此，英伟达只能竭尽全力在单个机架内扩展纵向扩展域。英伟达在GTC 2025上展示的用于Rubin Ultra的极端Kyber机架架构可扩展至144个GPU封装（576个GPU裸片）。该机架的密度是已经很密集的GB200/300 NVL72机架的4倍。由于GB200的制造和部署已经极为复杂，Kyber更是将其推向了新的高度。

paragraphs.source: Optics enables the opposite approach, scaling across multiple racks to increase world size, rather than packing more accelerators in a dense footprint which is challenging for power delivery and thermal density. This is possible with pluggable transceivers today, but again the costs of optical transceivers along with their high power consumption makes this impractical.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Optics enables the opposite approach, scaling across multiple racks to increase world size, rather than packing more accelerators in a dense footprint which is challenging for power delivery and thermal density. This is possible with pluggable transceivers today, but again the costs of optical transceivers along with their high power consumption makes this impractical.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Optics enables the opposite approach, scaling across multiple racks to increase world size, rather than packing more accelerators in a dense footprint which is challenging for power delivery and thermal density. This is possible with pluggable transceivers today, but again the costs of optical transceivers along with their high power consumption makes this impractical.

pro.text: 光学方案则采用了相反的方法，通过跨多个机架扩展来增加世界规模，而不是在密集空间内塞入更多加速器——后者对供电和热密度而言极具挑战。目前使用可插拔收发器可以实现这一点，但光收发器的成本及其高功耗再次使其变得不切实际。

paragraphs.source: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Scaling bandwidth on copper is also increasingly difficult. With Rubin, Nvidia is achieving the doubling of bandwidth by implementing a novel bi-directional SerDes technology, where both transmit and receive operations share the same channel, enabling full-duplex communication at 224Gbit/s transmit + 224Gbit/s receive per channel. Achieving “true” 448G per lane on copper remains another challenging feat with an uncertain time to market. In contrast, CPO presents multiple vectors for scaling bandwidth: Baud rate, DWDM, Additional Fiber Pairs and Modulation – all of which will be discussed in detail later in this article.

pro.text: 在铜缆上扩展带宽也变得越来越困难。在Rubin架构中，英伟达通过采用新型双向SerDes技术实现了带宽翻倍，即发送和接收操作共享同一通道，从而在每个通道实现224Gbit/s发送+224Gbit/s接收的全双工通信。在铜缆上实现“真正”的每通道448G仍是一项极具挑战性的任务，量产时间尚不确定。相比之下，共封装光学（CPO）提供了多种带宽扩展途径：波特率、密集波分复用（DWDM）、额外光纤对以及调制方式——所有这些将在本文后续部分详细讨论。
